text:
Fullmetal Alchemist: Volume 25 was released on 2010 April 22 in Japan and 2011 June 7 in the United States. It was written and drawn by Hiromu Arakawa. The cover features Alphonse in his armored body facing away from the Door of Truth where his original body is standing far behind him. This volume was later followed by the penultimate volume, Volume 26.

Synopsis

From the back of the volume:

"As Greed and King Bradley continue their battle, the mysterious homunculus "father" makes his move under Central City. In order to achieve his objectives, he will need to force Mustang to make an unthinkable choice. Meanwhile, Alphonse has the chance to regain his own body, but the sacrifice to do so may be too much."

Chapters

Chapter 100: Holding the Gate (開かずの扉, Akazu no Tobira)
Chapter 101: The Fifth Human Sacrifice (5人目の人柱, Goninme no Hitobashira)
Chapter 102: Before the Portal (扉の前, Tobira no Mae)
Chapter 103: For Whom? (誰のため, Dare no Tame)

ISBNs

Japan: ISBN 978-4-7575-2840-6
America: ISBN 978-1-4215-3924-9
